archetypes.name: Builder
archetypes.one_liner: Turns ideas into reality through momentum, production, and iteration.
at_your_best: Always knows the next concrete step.

daily_reps: Ship 1 artifact (offer page, script, email, SOP, pitch, demo).
weekly_reps: Debrief: what worked / what didn’t / what’s next.
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: One-hour build sprint daily for 30 days; ship a visible output every session.

rebalance.if_overusing: Add Operator cadence + Architect standards: define your weekly plan/review and a simple quality checklist.
rebalance.if_underusing: Start 10 days of 60-minute build sprints; no planning beyond the next task.

best.why: Build + demand creation = growth with momentum.

risky.fix: Timebox networking; protect build blocks first.

score_guidance.low: If low, you likely overthink or delay shipping; install short build sprints and visible weekly delivery.
score_guidance.mid: If mid, you ship but inconsistency or quality gaps appear; add Operator cadence + Architect checklist.
score_guidance.high: If high, you’re a production machine; guard against burnout and chaos by tightening standards and boundaries.

micro_playbook.decision_script: What is the smallest shippable version by Friday? What must be true for it to work? Ship it, then iterate.
micro_playbook.team_script: Here’s the outcome, here’s the deadline, here’s the quality bar. Show me progress checkpoints, not perfection.
micro_playbook.time_script: Protect 1–2 daily build blocks. Everything else must fit around shipping.

archetypes.name: Operator
archetypes.one_liner: Turns effort into predictable results with cadence, routines, and consistency.

how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Run a weekly plan/review for 4 straight weeks and track one scorecard metric daily.

rebalance.if_overusing: Add Builder shipping: commit to an imperfect weekly release and a 60-minute 'ship' sprint.
rebalance.if_underusing: Install two anchors: weekly planning + weekly review; if it’s not scheduled, it doesn’t exist.

best.why: Quality machine with clarity and standards.

risky.fix: Every lesson ends in implementation + measurement.

score_guidance.low: If low, your weeks feel random; start with planning/review and a simple scorecard.
score_guidance.mid: If mid, you have routines but still fight fires; document handoffs and remove bottlenecks.
score_guidance.high: If high, you can run a machine; watch rigidity—keep one innovation slot weekly.

micro_playbook.decision_script: What is the highest-leverage task for this week’s scorecard? Schedule it first.
micro_playbook.team_script: We measure outcomes weekly. Here’s the SOP, here’s the owner, here’s the deadline.
micro_playbook.time_script: If it matters, it goes on the calendar. Default to timeboxing.

archetypes.name: Resource Generator
archetypes.one_liner: Produces opportunity—money, deals, partnerships, attention, and leverage.

how_to_build.challenge_30_days: 14-day pipeline sprint twice: build, follow up, close—then document your winning script.

rebalance.if_overusing: Add Operator delivery guardrails: define capacity, timelines, and a fulfillment checklist before selling more.
rebalance.if_underusing: Start with a simple pipeline: 20 prospects → 5 conversations → 1 close per week.

risky.risk: Big promises at high speed can damage trust.
risky.fix: Require Architect standards + Operator capacity planning.

score_guidance.low: If low, you avoid asking/selling; start with daily outreach reps and one weekly offer.
score_guidance.mid: If mid, you can sell but consistency wobbles; systemize pipeline and follow-up.
score_guidance.high: If high, you can create opportunity; guard ethics, retention, and delivery capacity.

micro_playbook.decision_script: Does this move pipeline today? If not, it’s secondary.
micro_playbook.team_script: We sell what we can deliver. Capacity first, then offer volume.
micro_playbook.time_script: First hour each day is pipeline: outreach + follow-up + asks.

archetypes.name: Architect
archetypes.one_liner: Designs structure—strategy, standards, product quality, and long-term positioning.
at_your_best: Quality and clarity increase over time.

daily_reps: Define one standard: what 'good' looks like.
weekly_reps: System map: lead → sale → delivery → retention.
Define a quality checklist for the main deliverable.
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Ship a v1 weekly while refining standards; no week without market feedback.

rebalance.if_overusing: Add Builder: ship v1 and let feedback create the next draft.
rebalance.if_underusing: Write a single page strategy weekly for 4 weeks; keep it brutally simple.

risky.fix: One controlled bet per month (small downside, real upside).

score_guidance.low: If low, strategy feels fuzzy; start with a one-page offer + ICP statement.
score_guidance.mid: If mid, you have clarity but inconsistent standards; add checklists and system maps.
score_guidance.high: If high, you create durable structures; avoid perfection by shipping weekly.

micro_playbook.decision_script: Does this improve the system? Does it clarify positioning? If not, deprioritize.
micro_playbook.team_script: Here’s the standard. Here’s the checklist. Make quality visible.
micro_playbook.time_script: Reserve a weekly 'design block' for structure, not urgent noise.

archetypes.name: Connector
archetypes.one_liner: Creates trust and movement through relationships, community, and social intelligence.

how_to_build.challenge_30_days: 10 minutes/day relationship ritual + one collaboration outreach weekly for 30 days.

rebalance.if_overusing: Add Operator: timebox networking; protect deep work blocks first.
rebalance.if_underusing: Start with 3 value touches/day; track replies and referrals weekly.

risky.risk: Scattered execution due to constant context switching.
risky.fix: Build first, connect second; set office hours for networking.

score_guidance.low: If low, you isolate; start with consistent touches and a weekly partnership habit.
score_guidance.mid: If mid, you connect but lack boundaries; enforce time blocks and direct communication.
score_guidance.high: If high, relationships drive growth; protect energy and keep asks and outcomes clear.

micro_playbook.decision_script: Who is the one relationship that unlocks progress this week? Provide value then ask.
micro_playbook.team_script: We communicate directly, kindly, and quickly. No ambiguity.
micro_playbook.time_script: Schedule connection time; don’t let it eat build time.

archetypes.name: Nurturer
archetypes.one_liner: Builds loyalty and retention through care, culture, and customer experience.

daily_reps: Check in on one at-risk relationship.
weekly_reps: Retention review: who is slipping and why?
Improve one friction point in onboarding/service.
Boundary audit: where are you overgiving?
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Install a structured follow-up cadence and collect feedback weekly for 30 days.

rebalance.if_overusing: Add Protector: standards + consequences; define what you will/won’t do and stick to it.
rebalance.if_underusing: Add one care system: onboarding + follow-up cadence + a customer success checklist.

risky.fix: Tie teaching to outcomes, deadlines, and standards.

score_guidance.low: If low, customers feel transactional; install follow-ups and a service checklist.
score_guidance.mid: If mid, you care but overextend; strengthen boundaries and pricing.
score_guidance.high: If high, loyalty is your advantage; protect capacity and avoid resentment.

micro_playbook.decision_script: Will this increase trust without breaking capacity? If it breaks capacity, redesign it.
micro_playbook.team_script: We care deeply and we keep standards. Kind and clear.
micro_playbook.time_script: Serve in structured windows; don’t turn care into 24/7 availability.

archetypes.name: Protector
archetypes.one_liner: Reduces risk and preserves stability through boundaries, ethics, and guardrails.

daily_reps: Run a quick decision gate: what could break and how do we prevent it?
Track cash/inventory/time capacity in one glance.
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Add one guardrail per week for 4 weeks (policy, checklist, boundary, contingency).

rebalance.if_overusing: Add Builder: run controlled experiments with small downside and measurable upside.
rebalance.if_underusing: Add one guardrail per week; start with payment terms, scope boundaries, and quality checks.

best.why: Safe execution when speed respects guardrails.

risky.risk: Can freeze progress via perfection and fear.
risky.fix: Require one bold bet per month.

score_guidance.low: If low, you take avoidable hits; install boundaries, checklists, and cash discipline.
score_guidance.mid: If mid, you manage risk but still react; run weekly risk reviews and contingency plans.
score_guidance.high: If high, you’re resilient; avoid blocking growth—use controlled experiments.

micro_playbook.decision_script: What’s the worst-case? Can we cap the downside? If yes, proceed with a guardrail.
micro_playbook.team_script: Boundaries protect the mission. Standards are love.
micro_playbook.time_script: Weekly risk review prevents daily panic.

archetypes.name: Educator
archetypes.one_liner: Turns knowledge into value through clarity, training, and authority.

daily_reps: Create one short teachable asset (under 10 minutes).
Teach-to-task: every lesson ends in an action step.
Ask: what result should this create?
weekly_reps: Improve one training asset or onboarding step.
Measure one outcome (implementation rate, milestone completion).
Write one 'FAQ that sells' based on real objections.
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Publish one teachable asset weekly + attach an implementation checklist and measure results.

rebalance.if_overusing: Add Resource Generator: offer + ask. Teach briefly, then convert to a clear next step.
rebalance.if_underusing: Add 2 teaching moments/week (team or customer) with one measurable outcome.

risky.fix: Add Protector boundaries and outcome metrics.

score_guidance.low: If low, your message is unclear; start with short teach-backs and FAQs.
score_guidance.mid: If mid, you teach but it’s not systemized; add checklists and measurement.
score_guidance.high: If high, you lead with authority; ensure it drives action, not just information.

micro_playbook.decision_script: What’s the simplest explanation that leads to action today?
micro_playbook.team_script: We don’t just teach—we implement and measure.
micro_playbook.time_script: Timebox teaching; allocate the rest to execution and conversion.

risky_pairs.fix: Add Architect standards + Operator capacity planning.

combo_rules.growth_area_note: Growth Area isn’t identity; it’s a lever. Install 1–2 habits that express it and track progress monthly.
